abstract: Performance optimization guide for client-rendered React applications, tailored for Electron desktop apps and Vite SPAs. Contains 57 rules across 7 categories covering waterfall elimination, bundle optimization, client-side patterns, re-render prevention, rendering performance, JavaScript micro-optimizations, and advanced patterns. Server-side/SSR/Next.js rules removed. Examples adapted for IPC calls, zustand state, and Vite code-splitting.
